# SRC022 - 2025 G2 Buyer Behavior Report

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | B2B SaaS Buying |
| Authors / source | G2 |
| Year | 2025 |
| Source type | Vendor buyer survey |
| Quality | Medium |
| URL | [https://images.g2crowd.com/uploads/attachment/file/1470753/2025-G2-Buyer-Behavior-Report.pdf](https://images.g2crowd.com/uploads/attachment/file/1470753/2025-G2-Buyer-Behavior-Report.pdf) |

## Bias / limitation

Review-platform incentive; useful but not neutral.

## Core takeaway

AI search and review sites shape software evaluation; buyers demand clear value and flexible buying.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use for AI-search content, review-site strategy, and proof assets.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC022
- What it changes about our strategy:
- What it proves:
- What it does not prove:
- Ad tactic suggested:
- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
